wargear.Augar Array: 6" Aura, target unit does not scatter when Deepstriking. This Aura is cast when the first model is placed prior to scattering.
wargear.Chaff Launchers: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save against Ranged Attacks.
wargear.Dozerblade: Reroll Dangerous Terrain Tests and failed Move through Cover.
wargear.Extra Armour: You may treat all Crew Stun Results as Weapon Disabled.
wargear.Medicae Pack: 6" Aura, this model's unit and target unit gain a 5+ Feel No Pain.
wargear.Recovery Gear: Roll d6, on 5+ repair Immobilized or Crew Stun result.
wargear.Searchlight: This unit and target unit are no longer affected by Night rules.
wargear.Smoke Launchers: 6" range, put 5" Smoke Cloud that causes -1 to Hit and scatters to move an extra +1" until your Command Phase. One Use Only. Use in your Shooting Phase Only.
wargear.Standard: This inspiring battle flag gives the model equipped the following Auras: Tests.
wargear.Vox Caster: This model's unit may reroll failed Order Tests if the model Issuing the Order has a Vox Caster in its unit and the target unit has one as well. All Vehicles and Monsters in this Codex are considered equipped with Vox Casters.

rules.name: Mechanized Infantry
rules.description: Infantry units gain a 5+ Cover Save the Turn they Disembark from a Transport. Forced Disembark does not provide this Save.

rules.name: Hive City Inhabitants
rules.description: All Infantry suffer -1 cover save if it is not provided by a building, fortified terrain piece, or Mechanized Infantry.
